member.name: T:FrooxEngine.Headless.HeadlessConfig
member.summary: Options used to configure a Headless server. Read in from a JSON file on Headless start.

member.name: P:FrooxEngine.Headless.HeadlessConfig.Schema
member.summary: JSONSchema for this file, used for external users to validate and test this file.

member.name: P:FrooxEngine.Headless.HeadlessConfig.Comment
member.summary: An optional free form comment for this file. Used for identification for your configuration.

member.name: P:FrooxEngine.Headless.HeadlessConfig.UniverseID
member.summary: Optionally, specifies which universe this Headless Server will be in. See our wiki article on Universes for more info.

member.name: P:FrooxEngine.Headless.HeadlessConfig.TickRate
member.summary: Configures how many ticks(updates), should occur per second. Default is 60.

member.name: P:FrooxEngine.Headless.HeadlessConfig.MaxConcurrentAssetTransfers
member.summary: Specifies the maximum concurrent asset transfers for this headless server. Default is 4.

member.name: P:FrooxEngine.Headless.HeadlessConfig.UsernameOverride
member.summary: Configures a username which will override , within the world browser etc.

member.name: P:FrooxEngine.Headless.HeadlessConfig.LoginCredential
member.summary: Username for this Headless Server to use.

member.name: P:FrooxEngine.Headless.HeadlessConfig.LoginPassword
member.summary: User password for the Headless Server to use.

member.name: P:FrooxEngine.Headless.HeadlessConfig.LoginRequired
member.summary: When set to true, halt Headless start-up if the supplied login credentials fail.
member.remarks: This can be used in scenarios where the headless, needs a logged in user to function. For example if it accesses private worlds or content. Or in Security minded installations.

member.name: P:FrooxEngine.Headless.HeadlessConfig.StartWorlds
member.summary: A list of worlds/sessions to start/create when this Headless Server starts.

member.name: P:FrooxEngine.Headless.HeadlessConfig.DataFolder
member.summary: Optionally, override the folder which will be used to store data for this Headless Server.

member.name: P:FrooxEngine.Headless.HeadlessConfig.CacheFolder
member.summary: Optionally, override the folder which will be used to store cache for this Headless Server.

member.name: P:FrooxEngine.Headless.HeadlessConfig.LogsFolder
member.summary: Optionally, override the folder which will be used to store logs for this Headless Server.

member.name: P:FrooxEngine.Headless.HeadlessConfig.AllowedUrlHosts
member.summary: A list of hosts which will automatically be allowed for HTTP/WebSocket operations

member.name: P:FrooxEngine.Headless.HeadlessConfig.AutoSpawnItems
member.summary: A list of item URIs to spawn in when a world starts.
